protein_name: RNA-binding protein. Possesses nucleolytic activity against cytotoxic lymphocyte target cells. May be involved in apoptosis. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytolytic granule; cytoplasm; cytoplasmic stress granule; cytosol; lysosome; nucleoplasm; nucleus
raw_fields.Molecular Function: DNA binding; mRNA 3'-UTR binding; nucleic acid binding; protein binding; protein-RNA adaptor activity; RNA binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: apoptotic process; defense response; negative regulation of cell population proliferation; positive regulation of hippo signaling; positive regulation of miRNA-mediated gene silencing; regulation of alternative mRNA splicing, via spliceosome; regulation of cell population proliferation; regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II
